title: Family
overview: Boy genius Tanisu and his monster siblings struggle to make a life together after their mad scientist parents abandon them.

title: Heartbeat
overview: Tanisu and Aisuri clash over household responsibilities. Tanisu agrees to do all the housework himself, but gets lost running a simple errand.

title: Reality
overview: Realizing the limits of what a family of teenagers can do by themselves, Tanisu seeks help on the mainland with his mind-reading sister Suishi.

title: Homing
overview: After learning that the owner of their new house is coming back, Tanisu and his family return to their old home in search of medicine that will make the others appear human.

title: Infiltration
overview: During their expedition to their old home, the family shares bittersweet memories about their lives left behind. Meanwhile, Suishi meets the family's landlord.

title: Monster
overview: The landlord takes the family out for a day in the mountains. But the side effects of Ashisu and Aisuri's medicine begin to show themselves...

title: Sisters
overview: While Ashisu attempts to stop Aisuri's rampage, the sisters reflect upon the divergent paths their lives have taken as guinea pigs for their parents' experiments.

title: Observation
overview: The landlord leads an outing to pick up some used furniture and introduce the family to the local town. But when they arrive at the seller's house, they receive disheartening news...

title: Nature
overview: Snow is laid up with a cold, but the local doctor is out of medicine. While the landlord heads to the mainland to restock, Suishi seek a cure on the Internet.

title: Split
overview: Tanisu goes in search for Snow, who has gone missing. But when he finally finds him, he ends up witnessing a heartbreaking sight.

title: Scales
overview: After a sleepless night, Tanisu finds his family gone. While he runs around the island in search of them, he recalls the time they've spent together.

title: Frankenstein Family
overview: With the help of the landlord and Wei, Tanisu arrives at his old home, where he attempts to convince his family to return with him.
